A tailored quote for your chamber.

Tell us about your space and the model you're considering - and if you're not sure yet, that's exactly what we're here for. We'll come back with clear guidance and pricing.

David Gumbleton
Founder · Thrive Hyperbaric
You'll deal with David and the team directly - people who run these chambers every day.

Tell us about it

Your space, the model you're weighing up, and where you are. Rough is fine.

We reply within one working day, in your hours

David and the team come back with guidance and pricing tailored to you - not a template. We work across US and international time zones daily.

Decide at your pace

No obligation to go ahead. Take the information and move when you're ready.

No obligation, no hard sell. You'll only ever deal with a team that uses these chambers in our own clinic, every day.

Buying from the US?

Most HPO.TECH chambers are installed in the US. We work with US-based install and servicing teams, run from Detroit, Michigan - so your chamber is fitted and looked after locally.
